message:
test(net/ws/hpack): frame boundary, handshake, close protocol, HPACK invariants (bd-2hvn)

68 integration tests covering WebSocket frame payload length boundaries
(125/126/65535/65536), server→client unmasked path, reserved bits/opcode
rejection, masking alignment, handshake validation, close protocol state
machine, CloseReason encode/parse roundtrip, and HPACK sensitive encoding
and static/dynamic table boundary invariants.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
